title: Generic HUD
description: Generic HUD is an mod which uses HUD Lib. It adds incredibly generic information such as Ping and Coordinates to the HUD.
body:
# Generic HUD

Generic HUD adds various HUD Elements to [HUD Lib](https://modrinth.com/mod/hud-lib), it adds Coordinate HUD, Clock HUD, CPS HUD and Ping HUD. (You can view more in Gallery)

Clock HUD has some basic options for 12/24 hour time, and whether or not to include seconds.

## Chroma

Generic HUD supports Chroma Text (Can be disabled).

![Chroma Text on HUD](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/8vu3y1N4/images/09a37e2230d4c432099048ac213c57be690c5832.png)
